## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #12). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `gofmt -l .` prints nothing
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes (and new behavior has tests)
- [ ] No secrets added; configuration stays environment-only
- [ ] Stays **non-custodial** — no keys, signing, or fund movement
- [ ] Docs updated (README / .env.example / CHANGELOG) if behavior or config changed
